---
LastModifyingUser: admin
Test
---
!define TEST_SYSTEM {slim}

!|fixtures.AuthFixture|
|tokenUrl|bodyJson|tokenField|generateToken?|statusCode?|token?|responseBody?|
|https://c1790.trucap.io/trucapapi/api/v2/login|{"username":"suraj","password":"dummy123"}|token|true|200|Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.dummy.token|{"status":"success","message":"Login successful","token":"eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.dummy.token"}|
